creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

GNOME 2.26 includes a new module called gnome-user-share which allows for 
personal file sharing using the WebDAV protocol.  This application 
requires Apache 2.2 and the new mod_mdns module.  If you do not want this, 
install x11/gnome2-lite, then add the additional GNOME modules you desire.
